prerequisites.value: Psychic Sensitivity or ability to cast psychic spells.

description.value:
**Benefit:** You gain a +5 bonus on checks to notice haunts. In addition, when you target an incorporeal creature with a corporeal spell or effect that doesn’t deal damage, you have a 75% chance of affecting the target.

**Normal:** Corporeal spells and effects that don’t deal damage have only a 50% chance of affecting an incorporeal creature. Get this book AND support this site!
